description_long: This object is a portable stereo sound system with a cylindrical, elongated body and rounded ends, designed for urban environments. The exterior is predominantly matte black, with two prominent circular speaker grilles at each end and a subtle control interface on the front face. A small, circular indicator light is visible on the front, suggesting power or connectivity status. One side features a metallic or plastic label, likely for branding or model information, while the rest of the surface is smooth and unadorned. The object appears robust and is likely constructed from hard plastic with internal metal and electronic components. Its size and form suggest it is suitable for carrying or placing on the ground or a surface in public spaces.
description: A matte black, cylindrical portable stereo sound system with rounded ends, visible speaker grilles, and a small indicator light on the front. It features a side label and a smooth, robust exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main control interface and a small indicator light, with two circular speaker grilles visible at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a metallic or plastic label, with the cylindrical body and rounded speaker ends visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the label still partially visible, but no control interface or indicator light apparent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a smooth, unadorned surface with the cylindrical shape and rounded ends.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular label on the side, with unreadable text.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Circular speaker grilles with a fine mesh or perforated pattern at both ends.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A single button or indicator on the front face, with no visible complex control panel.
